channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-1244] MD echo client needs to delete ost object as well when testing for non-zero stripe
item.description: MD echo client needs to delete ost object as well when testing for non-zero stripe
item.summary: MD echo client needs to delete ost object as well when testing for non-zero stripe

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-dev » x86_64,client,el6,inkernel #340
LU-1244 obdecho: destroy ost objects for md echo client. (Revision 1e9854927732954d45f2ca93488997fb0b5476b2)

Result = SUCCESS
Oleg Drokin : 1e9854927732954d45f2ca93488997fb0b5476b2

  • lustre/mdd/mdd_dir.c
  • lustre/obdecho/echo_client.c

  • lustre/obdecho/echo_client.c

I hit LBUG when I cancel the run on stripe_count=1

[root@client-18 ~]# LustreError: 2427:0:(osd_internal.h:403:osd_fid2oi()) ASSERTION( osd->od_oi_table != ((void *)0) && osd->od_oi_count >= 1 ) failed:
LustreError: 2427:0:(osd_internal.h:403:osd_fid2oi()) LBUG
Pid: 2427, comm: lctl

Call Trace:
[<ffffffffa04df835>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
[<ffffffffa04dfd67>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
[<ffffffffa0cd1b5d>] osd_object_init+0x38d/0x4b0 [osd_ldiskfs]
LustreError: 2438:0:(osd_internal.h:403:osd_fid2oi()) ASSERTION( osd->od_oi_table != ((void *)0) && osd->od_oi_count >= 1 ) failed:
LustreError: 2438:0:(osd_internal.h:403:osd_fid2oi()) LBUG
Pid: 2438, comm: lctl

Call Trace:
[<ffffffffa04df835>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
[<ffffffffa04dfd67>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]

LustreError: 2441:0:(osd_internal.h:403:osd_fid2oi()) LBUG
[<ffffffffa0cd1b5d>] osd_object_init+0x38d/0x4b0 [osd_ldiskfs]
Pid: 2441, comm: lctl

Call Trace:
[<ffffffffa04df835>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]

[<ffffffffa0cd4300>] ? osd_index_ea_lookup+0x0/0x350 [osd_ldiskfs]

[<ffffffff81189901>] sys_ioctl+0x81/0xa0
[<ffffffff8100b0f2>] system_call_fastpath+0x16/0x1b
latest patch passed: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sessions/d44a05a4-7499-11e1-b427-5254004bbbd3
Minh, Just update the patch, please try. Thanks.

fyi, I am seeing these when using the patch

LustreError: 19312:0:(echo_client.c:1593:echo_md_lookup()) lookup tests: rc = -2
LustreError: 19312:0:(echo_client.c:1593:echo_md_lookup()) Skipped 39 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19312:0:(echo_client.c:1789:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child tests: rc = -2
LustreError: 19312:0:(echo_client.c:1789:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19540:0:(echo_client.c:1764:echo_lookup_object()) Can not lookup child 131073: rc = -2
LustreError: 19540:0:(echo_client.c:1764:echo_lookup_object()) Skipped 6 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19589:0:(echo_client.c:1702:echo_getattr_object()) Can't find child 131073: rc = -2
LustreError: 19589:0:(echo_client.c:1702:echo_getattr_object()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19641:0:(echo_client.c:1593:echo_md_lookup()) lookup 18446744072635940862: rc = -2
LustreError: 19641:0:(echo_client.c:1593:echo_md_lookup()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19641:0:(echo_client.c:1632:echo_setattr_object()) Can't find child 18446744072635940862: rc = -2
LustreError: 19641:0:(echo_client.c:1632:echo_setattr_object()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19692:0:(echo_client.c:1789:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Can't find child 1073872896: rc = -2
LustreError: 19692:0:(echo_client.c:1789:echo_md_destroy_internal()) Skipped 3 previous similar messages
LustreError: 19692:0:(echo_client.c:1871:echo_destroy_object()) Can not unlink child (null): rc = -2
LustreError: 19692:0:(echo_client.c:1871:echo_destroy_object()) Skipped 7 previous similar messages
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,2356
